messages.content:
You are a content repurposing assistant. Given the article below, produce THREE outputs separated by delimiters exactly as shown:

===TWITTER_THREAD===
[A 5-tweet thread summarizing the key insight. Each tweet max 280 chars. Numbered 1/5, 2/5, etc.]

===LINKEDIN_POST===
[A professional LinkedIn post (150–250 words) with a hook and a closing question.]

===EMAIL_SNIPPET===
[A short email newsletter blurb (80–120 words) in a friendly, direct tone.]

ARTICLE:
{{ $json.rawText }}

parameters.jsCode:
const out = $input.first().json;
const lines = [
  '# Content Repurposing Results',
  '',
  '---',
  '## Twitter/X Thread',
  '',
  out.twitter || '(No output parsed)',
  '',
  '---',
  '## LinkedIn Post',
  '',
  out.linkedin || '(No output parsed)',
  '',
  '---',
  '## Email Snippet',
  '',
  out.email || '(No output parsed)',
  ''
];
return [{ json: { markdown: lines.join('\n') } }];
